title: Feedback - the thank you card after sending the feedback
scenario: "Thank you" feedback confirmation card does not auto-dismiss after 5 seconds or via back button in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left corner.
5. Fill in the feedback form with relevant details.
6. Tap the 'Submit' or 'Send' button to submit the feedback.
7. Observe the 'Thank you' card/note that appears on the screen.
expected: A 'Thank you' card/note is displayed on the screen. The note should be visible for 5 seconds and then automatically disappear. Alternatively, the user can dismiss the note immediately by tapping the back button.
